case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.50, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF SEP-27-2007, GRANTED
CONTRA COSTA SHERIFF'S CONTACTED, ANGELA; NO RECORD OF CCSF VS. MENA. (ONLY EDD VS. ALEJANDRO C. MENA--CASE NO. 03ED04880)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, ALEJANDRO CESAR
